name: Okta: Stale Privileged Users (Direct)
description: Finds user accounts that have not logged in for at least 180 days and directly hold privileged role assignments.
query:
MATCH p = (u:Okta_User)-[:Okta_HasRoleAssignment]->(:Okta_RoleAssignment)-[:Okta_ScopedTo]->(:Okta)
WHERE u.lastLogin IS NULL OR datetime(u.lastLogin) <= datetime() - duration("P180D")
RETURN p
LIMIT 1000
